summary: Added --version/-V support to install.sh: VERSION constant, usage text entry, and short-circuit case in argument parsing that prints 'install.sh version v1' and exits 0 before any dependency checks or file writes.
changes: install.sh: added VERSION constant, --version/-V case, and usage text
tests: bash install.sh --version: prints 'install.sh version v1' and exits 0
bash install.sh -V: prints 'install.sh version v1' and exits 0
bash install.sh --engine-ref custom --version: prints installer version (not engine ref) and exits 0
bash install.sh --help: shows new '-V, --version' line in usage
bash .agent/scripts/validate.sh: exit 0, all engine and installer tests pass
